texto: He said the truth is like that water: it doesn't matter how hard you try to bury it
autor: it'll always find some way back to the surface. It's resilient.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a it'll always find some way back to the surface. It's resilient.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “He said the truth is like that water: it doesn't matter how hard you try to bury it” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, k-a-tucker, burying-water pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de burying-water.
